_doc: The Level-3 lint (a 4th verifier beside validate/coverage) enforces the operating test on the authored content layers — Level 3 §4 propositions and §3C entries (and the MEANING_COORDINATES prose fields compiled from them): a Level-3 block must contain ONLY payload Q&A pairs; flag every line that isn't one. It scans BOTH questions and answers, including the same-line '**Q:** … **A:** …' format. Rules: link_markers = cross_ref / inter-proposition-link lines that don't belong in §4 payload (relocate to the figure/links layer); meta_questions = analytical questions about form/structure/style rather than payload; forbidden_vocabulary = grammatical/linguistic jargon (WHOLE-WORD in prose only, not controlled slot-names); interpretive_labels; conditioning_qa = steering questions (Register?/Self-form?/…); compound = non-atomic answers (';'/','/' and ') with an entity-list guard so a single answer naming several entities is NOT flagged. It SURFACES drift; the human judges. tier 1 = unambiguous; tier 2 = judge-in-context.
_slot_name_doc: SC-0070: the forbidden-slot-NAME guard. An event_specific_slots KEY name must not carry grammatical/thematic-role vocabulary (the WEIRD/case-grammar priming the method avoids — CLAUDE.md:176 'event-participant slot names (giver/blesser/deceased/…), NEVER agent/patient/theme'). A key leaks iff an underscore-delimited TOKEN is in forbidden_slot_name_tokens; slot_name_allow exempts the fundamental communicative-event roles (Marcia's keep). Scoped to event_specific_slots keys ONLY — never the sanctioned L2 objects_in_scene / object_id physical-object namespace. tier 1 = BLOCK.
_value_shape_doc: SC-0073: the value-SHAPE prose guard — the VALUE analogue of the slot-name guard (SC-0070 guarded slot KEY names; this guards slot VALUES), the make-impossible capstone of the sentence-token triage. A sentence-shaped UPPER_SNAKE value in event_specific_slots is prose-in-disguise (e.g. WISHED_FULL_WAGES_FROM_YHWH_UNDER_WHOSE_WINGS_SHE_TOOK_REFUGE). Length alone can't separate it from settled long vocabulary (DIRECTS_HEARER_TO_DO, HA_ISH_THE_MAN, SIX_STEP_LADDER_…), so the guard EXEMPTS BY MEMBERSHIP FIRST, then applies a ≥value_shape_prose_min_tokens shape test to the remainder. Exemptions E1/E2/E3/E7 (approved-enumerations any axis / validation-rules closed_lists / quarantined-vocabulary / the B,PL,O,TM,TH,CB,FIG,I,D code namespaces) derive LIVE from the pinned spec files — NOT re-listed here, so the allow-list can't drift from canon. Only the guard-specific lists live here: value_shape_kept_form_slots (E5, slot KEYS whose values are kept structural forms), value_shape_referential_address_slots (E4, the R1 address-form slot KEYS besides *referential_form), value_shape_explicit_keeps (E6, the 4 ruled-KEEP VALUES — 3 of which sit in non-kept-form slots, so they must be exempted by value). Scoped to event_specific_slots VALUES only. preserve_form=true clauses are covered by E7 (they are registered in quarantined-vocabulary). Calibration: docs/SC-0073-VALUE-SHAPE-GUARD-SHEET.md. tier 1 = BLOCK.
_answer_labels_doc: Softer interpretive phrasings that are drift ONLY in a §4 Q&A answer (where they label an act instead of stating it). Applied to meaning-map §4 ANSWERS ONLY — never to MEANING_COORDINATES fields, closed-list speech_act values, §3C entries/notes, or questions — so they cannot false-positive on a governed enum (e.g. REFUSES_REQUEST_WITH_COUNTER_DECLARATION) or a §3C relocation note, both of which are out of scope for the §4 content sweep.

substitutions.plain: she ate · she was satisfied · she had leftover (+ figure, as conditioning)
just the event: she remained / he went
he tells her to… / he asks that…
name the doer: Boaz / the one who gives
